scripts.tail:web:cf: npm --prefix apps/web exec wrangler -- tail crypto-signal-lab-web-production --format pretty
scripts.bootstrap:api: cd apps/api && python3 -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.tail:api:cf: npm --prefix apps/api exec wrangler -- tail crypto-signal-lab-api-production --format pretty
scripts.deploy:cf: npm run deploy:api:cf && npm run deploy:web:cf
scripts.dev: printf 'Run `npm run dev:web` and `npm run dev:api` in separate terminals.\n'
